title: Categorical Cross Entropy
summary: A loss function used for classification tasks with categorical outputs. It sits inside Loss Functions / Classification Loss. Start after Cross-Entropy and Cross-Entropy Method. It opens into Categorical Cross-Entropy Loss Function and Categorical-Cross-Entropy (Softmax).
